tool_purpose: Calculate the expected evolutionary fitness of a creature based on the individual values and contributions of its traits.

trait_contributions.description: List of the percentage contributions of each trait to the overall fitness, which must sum to 1.

trait_values.description: List of trait values, which are decimal numbers between 0 and 1, where 1 represents the trait maximally contributing to fitness.

arguments.name: trait_values
arguments.description: List of trait values, which are decimal numbers between 0 and 1, where 1 represents the trait maximally contributing to fitness.
